battleTraits.name: The Unquiet Dead
battleTraits.effect: One of your Deathrattle Skeletons units is not set up during deployment. From the third battle round onwards, you can set it up wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Aura of Antiquity
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase
battleTraits.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with any friendly units. Roll a dice; on a 3+, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target's melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: Shyishan Blade
enhancements.effect: The Rend characteristic of the general's Baleful Tomb Blade is 2.

enhancements.name: Stolen Animus
enhancements.effect: Each time your general scores a critical hit, Heal (2) your general after the Attack ability has been resolved.

enhancements.name: Propelled by Hate
enhancements.effect: Pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. You can re-roll charge rolls for that target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Soul-Drain Pendant
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general and roll a dice. On a 2+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Overwhelming Hordes
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly non-HERO units that target a unit that has fewer models than the attacking unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Deathmarch
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO unit that is not in combat. For the rest of the turn, add 1" to the target's Move characteristic and add 3 to its control score.

abilities.name: King of Shambling Bones
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly Deathrattle unit wholly within 12" of this unit. Roll a dice; on a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by the target for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Guardians of the King
abilities.effect: While your general is within this unit's combat range, both this unit and your general have WARD (5+).

abilities.name: Cursed to Rise Once More
abilities.effect: You can return 1 slain model to this unit.

abilities.name: Skeleton Legion (Tomb Host)
abilities.effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
